name: Downtown Grand Junction Market on Main

Products.value: Farm products from the Western Slope and around Colorado

notes: On-file website (downtowngj.org/events/market-on-main/) is confirmed correct and official (run by Downtown Grand Junction, a DDA). 2026 season runs Thursdays, July 9 - Sept 24, 5:30pm until dusk, held near 4th and Main (no separate street address given for the market site itself; the 101 S 3rd Street Suite 100 address on file is the Downtown Grand Junction office address, confirmed via their contact page, so left unchanged rather than treated as a market-site address). Market accepts SNAP and Double Up Food Bucks (up to $20 additional). Phone number (970.245.9697) is the general Downtown Grand Junction office line, not market-specific. No email, ADA accessibility statement, or certified-organic statement found on official pages.
